gaps: Live Kubernetes/browser smoke was not run in this review environment.

The local clone is shallow/grafted with no merge-base between origin/main and origin/round-20260511t154050z-44ce-integration, so review used the latest integration tree at commit 89237d0 and the approved OpenSpec artifacts directly.

summary: Verdict: accept. No blocking issues found. The latest repaired integration commit 89237d0 conforms to the approved wire-new-ui-1 OpenSpec artifacts, including frontend application of backend snapshot_ready safe snapshot recovery through applyLiveEvent replacement of payload.snapshot while preserving loadedAt and resetting live connection/reconnect state. Verification run: python3 scripts/validate-openspec-change.py wire-new-ui-1, npm ci, npm run typecheck, npm test, npm run build, and python3 -m unittest discover -s tests from new-ui-evaluation. PR readiness: ready, with residual verification gaps limited to no live Kubernetes/browser smoke and no normal merge-base diff in this shallow/grafted clone.
